hypotheses.evidence: 6173 method-vocabulary tokens and 208 commanding imperatives — method is pervasive
hypotheses.hypothesis: the Quran offers no defined method of understanding

hypotheses.evidence: 1468 reasoning-vocabulary tokens + 649 observation tokens — reason/observation are heavily invoked
hypotheses.hypothesis: the Quran relies only on faith

hypotheses.evidence: it also invokes آیات (signs), observation (نظر/سمع), nature, and the text itself
hypotheses.hypothesis: the Quran relies only on reason

hypotheses.evidence: it points outward to nature (291 nature-ayahs with signs/cognition) and history (stories)
hypotheses.hypothesis: the Quran relies only on the text

hypotheses.evidence: it also invokes the text (كتاب/قرآن), reason, and history
hypotheses.hypothesis: the Quran relies only on nature

hypotheses.evidence: it integrates observation + signs (nature/history/self) + reason/reflection + the text — no single source
hypotheses.hypothesis: the Quran offers an integrative (combined) method

verdict: H1–H5 are falsified; H6 survives. The Quran offers an explicit, INTEGRATIVE methodology — observe the signs (in text, nature, history, self) and reason/reflect/remember — not a single-source method.
